title: Infectious Diseases
description: Infectious diseases is a subject that studies the occurrence, development, spread, diagnosis, treatment and prevention of all kinds of infectious diseases in and outside the human body. The aim of our course is to cultivate students' basic theories, skills and professional qualities of infectious diseases and lay a good foundation for future medical care work and medical scientific research for infectious diseases.

instructors.name: Dou Xiaoguang;Sheng Qiuju;Feng Guohe;Yang Wei;Zhao Lianrong;Bai Han;Gu Qiuhong;Zhao Ning;Wang xuelian
